feat.name: Ease the Burden
feat.text: You wash away a creature’s pain with a touch. An adjacent creature regains 100 Hit Points and reduces their drained, clumsy, enfeebled, frightened, and stupefied conditions by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Healing
traits.text: A healing effect restores a creature’s body, typically by restoring Hit Points, but sometimes by removing diseases or other debilitating effects.
